headline: Dr P 🩺💉 Ketamine Cooks Chandler Bing 😵🍆 - 30 MO Prison SLAM 💥🔒
text:
CA Doc Salvador Plasencia 🩺😈 – aka DR P 💊👑 – just got SLAMMED 🔨🍑 with 30 MO in FED POUND-ME-TOWN 🏛️🚔 for pumping FRIENDS 🛋️😂 legend Matthew Perry CHANDLER BING 🕶️😏 full of KETAMINE HORSE JUICE 🐴💦! First of FIVE shady Hollywood drug pimps 🤑🚫 to eat SENTENCING IRON 🍆🔒 in Matty's 2023 OD exit stage left 😵‍💫🏠 – Perry fam RAGING 🔥👊 calling this quack the TOP CULPRIT 🥇😡 who fed the addiction beast like a KETAMINE QUEEN 👸💊 reigning from her LA DRUG EMPORIUM 🏰🍬!

Mommy Suzanne Morrison 💔👩‍🍼 TEAR-BOMBING 😭💧 in court: 'You called my baby boy a MORON 🤡📱 but there was NOTHING moronic about CHANDLER SLAYING 😂🛋️! You swore HIPPOCRATIC OATH 🏛️🤝 then BROKE it like a cheap vial 💉🔨!' Texts exposed Dr P simping for 💰💸: 'How much ya pay bby? 😏' Fam letters DROPPING BOMBS 💣📜 – Daddy John & Stepmom Debbie: 'Matthew's recovery NEEDED your NOPE 🚫🛑 but you jacked his wallet & life like a JACKAL 🦁😈!' They called him out for DEVASTATING the fam – no more PATRIARCH THRONE 👑💔, just jackals feasting on his THIRD ACT COMEBACK DREAMS 🎭🚀!

Dr P 🩺😢 got MOMMY TEARS 👩‍🍼😭 in the stands, spilling SORRY SAUCE 🥺🙏: 'No excuse bros, I FAILED HARD 😩💥 – wanted to raise my 2YO nugget right but gotta explain this L to him 📖🤦‍♂️. Shoulda protected Matty like his queen mom said!' Judge Sherilyn Peace Garnett 👩‍⚖️🔨 DROPPED the HAMMER: 30 months PLUS $5.6K fine 💸😤 – straight to CUFFS 🚔🔒! Pleaded guilty to FOUR counts 💉📋 (max 40 YRS 😱) after prosecutors begged for 3YR smackdown 👊.

This underground Hollywood K-HOLE NETWORK 🕳️🌃 had Dr P SHOOTING UP Perry AT HOME 🏠💉 and aquarium PARKING LOT 🐠🚗 – teaching asst Kenneth Iwamasa 🧑‍💼📚 how to MAINLINE like a pro, slinging 20 VIALS 🍬💦 lozenges & syringes Sep-Oct '23! Perry started LEGAL DEPRESSION DOSES 🧠💊 but went FULL ADDICT MODE 😵‍💫 craving MORE – prosecutors TEA-SPILL ☕: 'These vultures EXPLOITED Chandler's demons for FAT STACKS 🤑💰!' Other four – doc bro, asst, K-QUEEN 👑💊 & fatal dose duo – all guilty pleas, sentencing SOON 🔥⏳.

Plasencia's letter? 'Clinic STRUGGLING 😩🏥, saw addiction RED FLAGS 🚩 but BIG BUCKS 🍆💸 too TASTY – surrendered license VOLUNTARY 😔📜!' Fam ROASTED: 'DOCTOR DADDY supposed to HEAL not KILL 😡🩸!' Ketamine's HALLUCINO-TRIPPY 🌀😵 magic only for MD hands – but Dr P turned Perry into a JUNKIE ZOMBIE 🧟‍♂️💊. Hollywood's dark side EXPOSED 📸💥 – no more 'Could I BE any more dead?' jokes from our boy 😢🛋️. Perry fam OWNS this W, but at what cost? 💔🔥‼️
